description: Two sides compared across a hand-drawn wavy divider (before/after, X vs Y, big group vs tiny group).
whenToUse: A comparison / two-ends-of-a-scale beat (forest vs construction, normal vs mutated, most vs fewest).
generalize: The two subjects and the field are SLOTS; the divider + wipe are fixed.
produces: two gpt-image-2 illustrations (left/right) -> rembg -> SplitCompare places them with a wavy divider.
styleLock: Both halves are gpt-image-2 art; the divider is the house style.
rules: Symmetric composition; one idea per side.
